caption: A man with a unique silver-blonde mohawk hairstyle, glasses, and headphones sits before a professional microphone in a studio setting. He is wearing a white button-down shirt with a red bowtie and gold suspenders. In the background, a woman with bright pink hair is partially visible, standing near a display that features the text "UNIQUE FASHION". A framed logo depicting a green shield hangs on the wall behind them. Throughout the sequence, the man remains relatively still, slightly shifting his facial expression and head position as he looks toward someone off-screen. On-screen graphics are present in every frame, including a logo on the left that reads "#REALTALK PODCAST" and text on the right that reads "REALTALK 101". The lighting is bright and consistent, maintaining a clear focus on the man in the foreground.
